project.name: Recipe-Bridge Fixture
project.description: Jawata-owned, compile-clean fixture (JRE-only) for Sprint 22a R.1 (Stage 14): a GoF singleton (Registry) with two call sites, so the recipe bridge — find_quality_issue kind=singleton -> refactoring(action=plan, kind=singleton) -> apply_plan — resolves to the inline_singleton recipe and runs it PARITY-GATED (compile stays 0/0 through the transform). Genuinely compiles so the parity gate has a real 0-baseline.
